source: independent (non-author) pred-scout-coach-critic reviewing data/postgame/*.json coaching against the match facts; preference-based / ungrounded lines flagged; grounded rewrites applied back

073deb42-450e-45ae-8de3-1f765cad8c00.quote: Lost the objective war badly (6–25) and the towers with it. Willy's Boris went 4/8 in the jungle and the lanes were behind. pred.gg had the lanes roughly even-to-losing — this was a fights/objective loss. Contest fewer, win more.
073deb42-450e-45ae-8de3-1f765cad8c00.issue: draft read mischaracterized — carry, mid and offlane all read favored, not even-to-losing
073deb42-450e-45ae-8de3-1f765cad8c00.rewrite: Lost the objective war badly (6–25) and the towers with it. Willy's Boris went 4/8 in the jungle and the lanes fell behind despite carry, mid and offlane all reading favored — this was a fights/objective loss, not a draft one. Contest fewer, win more.

1faf6a6f-5657-4179-abc9-46bee11f3d25.quote: Carry, mid, offlane and jungle all read favored — and you still went down 23 objective kills to 4 and put zero damage into objectives all game. The problem was relentless bad trades and forced fights: you died in the open early (3.9, 9.8), then threw the big ones — 1-4 at their Mini Prime (20.5) and 1-5 at their Fangtooth (23.7) sealed it. You won a real fight at 19.6 (3-2) and immediately gave it back at 20.5. Gadget (42k magical) was the carry and your whole team was 4/5 magical damage — one enemy magic-resist item blunted most of your output, which is the comp flag. Stop committing the full squad into their objectives; you never once took a major, so there was no reason to keep fighting on their terms.
1faf6a6f-5657-4179-abc9-46bee11f3d25.issue: claims you never took a major, but majors were 4-23 — you took 4
1faf6a6f-5657-4179-abc9-46bee11f3d25.rewrite: Carry, mid, offlane and jungle all read favored — and you still went down 23 objective kills to 4. The problem was relentless bad trades and forced fights: you died in the open early (3.9, 9.8), then threw the big ones — 1-4 at their Mini Prime (20.5) and 1-5 at their Fangtooth (23.7) sealed it. You won a real fight at 19.6 (3-2) and immediately gave it back at 20.5. Their healer was Gadget and your team was 4/5 magical damage — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of your output, which is the comp flag. Stop committing the full squad into their objectives; at 4 majors to their 23 you were fighting on their terms all game.

1faf6a6f-5657-4179-abc9-46bee11f3d25.quote: Aurora as jungle — 4/5/10, but 5 deaths well over your norm, and you put 0 damage into objectives all game. You were in the losing Mini Prime and Fangtooth fights (20.5, 23.7). As the jungler you set tempo; with four favored lanes the play was to invade and take a major, not to keep feeding fights you couldn't win.
1faf6a6f-5657-4179-abc9-46bee11f3d25.issue: places the jungler in the 20.5 fight — the macro says he was dead 27s before it, making it a 4v4
1faf6a6f-5657-4179-abc9-46bee11f3d25.rewrite: Aurora as jungle — 4/5/10, with 5 deaths well over your norm. You went down 27s before the 20.5 Mini Prime fight, so that game-defining loss was fought without you, and you were in the 23.7 Fangtooth loss. As the jungler you set tempo; with four favored lanes the play was to invade and take a major, not to keep feeding fights you couldn't win.

309dc19a-9130-4f28-863a-29fef5cdd55a.quote: A 22-minute loss at 8 kills to 19 deaths, 0–5 towers, every major theirs — the fights were picked deep in their half without the numbers.
309dc19a-9130-4f28-863a-29fef5cdd55a.issue: 'every major theirs' contradicts the facts — majors were 10-14, you took 10
309dc19a-9130-4f28-863a-29fef5cdd55a.rewrite: A 22-minute loss at 8 kills to 19 deaths, 0–5 towers, majors 10–14 against — the fights were picked deep in their half without the numbers.

309dc19a-9130-4f28-863a-29fef5cdd55a.quote: Phase won the support lane all game, but the 20-minute read applies to you: alive and ahead while a 4v5 played out at their inhibitor — shove the advantage and rotate before the team commits. Four deaths against your 3 norm in 22 minutes says the commits came anyway.
309dc19a-9130-4f28-863a-29fef5cdd55a.issue: invents a fight location (their inhibitor) not in the facts — implausible at 0-5 towers
309dc19a-9130-4f28-863a-29fef5cdd55a.rewrite: Phase won the support lane all game, but the 20-minute read applies to you: alive and ahead while the team fought a 4v5 across the map — shove the advantage and rotate before the team commits. Four deaths in 22 minutes says the commits came anyway.

3b299c1c-84af-42e2-9bc5-962582666f7b.quote: The draft was close to even: jungle favored (Grux 51.5% into Yin), support a touch unfavored (Zinx 50.4% into Riktor), and the lanes only a hair behind — Murdock 48.4% into Sparrow, TwinBlast 48.5% into Fey, Bayle 47.6% into Steel. You won the 16.5 Fangtooth fight (2-0) and out-took majors 24-29, but still lost structures 6 to 14 — buffs that never became towers. Two leaks: Grux died 9 times and TwinBlast 6, handing the map back while you held the buff; and you're 4/5 physical with only one magic resist into a 3-magical comp. You poked, they sieged.
3b299c1c-84af-42e2-9bc5-962582666f7b.issue: 'out-took majors 24-29' reverses the count — 24-29 means they out-took you
3b299c1c-84af-42e2-9bc5-962582666f7b.rewrite: The draft was close to even: jungle favored (Grux 51.5% into Yin), support a touch unfavored (Zinx 50.4% into Riktor), and the lanes only a hair behind — Murdock 48.4% into Sparrow, TwinBlast 48.5% into Fey, Bayle 47.6% into Steel. You won the 16.5 Fangtooth fight (2-0) and kept the majors close (24-29 against), but still lost structures 6 to 14 — buffs that never became towers. Two leaks: Grux died 9 times and TwinBlast 6, handing the map back while you held the buff; and you're 4/5 physical with only one magic resist into a 3-magical comp. You poked, they sieged.

ed9dad02-dc71-45d8-92be-ffab9e57cc24.quote: Group for the 25-minute-plus Primes as a five — that's where the towers and the game went. Tighten the lineup so your solo lanes aren't uphill.
ed9dad02-dc71-45d8-92be-ffab9e57cc24.issue: 'tighten the lineup' is role-preference advice, not game coaching
ed9dad02-dc71-45d8-92be-ffab9e57cc24.rewrite: Group for the late Primes as a five — that's where the towers and the game went.

f8507739-ef5a-464c-b3bd-01f2eb4bfd6f.quote: Classic good conversion: objectives were 14–17 against you, but you out-towered them 10–4 and Cuban snowballed his lane. Anti-heal was light (1 vs Narbash) and fine. The shape is right — take what fights you win straight to towers. Only nit: a couple bottom-two seats (Mr_Meat support).
f8507739-ef5a-464c-b3bd-01f2eb4bfd6f.issue: closes on a seat/role-preference nit (and only one bottom-two seat is tagged, not a couple)
